description: 3 unrelated incidents: SSL cert expiry, auth token failure, CPU spike from unrelated batch job. Should NOT cluster.

alerts.text: SSL certificate for api.example.com expires in 3 days. TLS handshake failing for some clients. Certificate chain validation error.
JWT authentication tokens rejecting valid sessions. Auth service returning 401. Token signing key rotation may have caused mismatch.
CPU at 94% on worker-node-3. Batch ML training job consuming all cores. No impact on user-facing services. Scheduled job running as expected.
